currentLinkedIn.headline: Senior Technical Recruiter at Klarna | Engineering Hiring · Sourcing · Berlin
currentLinkedIn.about: I match engineers with roles where they'll actually grow. Seven years of technical recruiting — I care about the candidate experience as much as I care about the hire.

experience.title: Senior Technical Recruiter
bullets: Hired 80+ engineers across backend, data, and security in FY24; median offer acceptance rate 88%
Built a structured technical screening process that reduced mis-hires by 30% year over year
Partnered with Engineering Directors on headcount planning and levelling calibration

experience.title: Technical Recruiter
bullets: Sourced and closed 45 software engineers for APAC and EMEA product teams
Introduced candidate-NPS survey; improved candidate experience score from 3.4 to 4.6 out of 5
